Strategy Proof
Growth Thinking
Retention over vanity metricsPrioritize active, engaged users over inflated follower counts. Real traction is measured in participation, not presence.
Community-first, then scaleBuild a loyal core before pushing growth. A tight-knit 100 outperforms a passive 10,000 every time.
Distribution via existing networksLeverage WhatsApp groups, X threads, and existing communities instead of paid acquisition — lower cost, higher trust.
Onboarding funnel design for student ecosystemsExperienced designing structured onboarding flows — tested at scale with 300+ physical onboards and 700+ digital registrations.
